LABEL: NRSA Panel Assignment. Text that has form NRSnn_mmXXXn_YYYY, where nn is current cycle year (09, 14, 19, etc), mm is cycle year stream site was first selected for sampling, XXXn denotes revisit status, and YYYY denotes base or over sample status.  XXXn equals either RVT2 (if site should be visited twice in current cycle year) or RVT (if site should be visited once in current cycle and was previously visited in a prior cycle year) and is blank otherwise.  YYYY  is either blank (if the stream site is a base site) or equals OverSamp (if the stream site is an over sample site).  Note: For state specific designs, state two letter code is added.  Hand-picked sites have value \NONE\". No missing or \"blank\" values allowed."
